word: G5077 - τεφρόω - tephróō - tef-ro'-o - Turn to ashes

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τεφρόω

- Transliteration: Tephroo

- Phonetic: tef-ro'-o

- Definition:

1. reduce to ashes

- Origin: from tephra (ashes)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From τέφρα tephra (ashes); to incinerate that is consume: - turn to ashes.
